problem id: 57e76efa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  11000110 -> 10011111
  10101111 -> 10001111
  01000011 -> 01001111
  01101101 -> 10101111
  10101110 -> 00011111
  01011000 -> 01111111
  01111100 -> 00111111
  10000011 -> 01001111
  01000111 -> 00001111
  00011111 -> 10001111

query: 01100100
predicted answer: 10111111
